svg.aria-label: CueLine run states: ready, awaiting_controller, awaiting_caller, awaiting_caller_work, complete, blocked, cancelled — and what each one means.
svg.title: CueLine run states
svg.text: status values are verbatim API strings
created and durable; nothing sent yet
one durable send done — observe once, never resend
advise handoff — coordination-only, no side-effect claim
work pending — unstarted until claim + start
final delivery returned verbatim; optional archive, exactly once
the controller stopped with an explicit reason
durable cancellation; started ownerless work becomes ambiguous
Anything ambiguous requires explicit reconcile — CueLine never resends and never guesses.
Round limit 12 by default; a non-default maxRounds is fixed when the run is created.
